channel.title: Shubham Vij - Blog
channel.description: Articles on software engineering, AI, machine learning, and research.

item.title: Attention, Everywhere: One Mechanism from GPT to Graph Transformers
item.description: Multi-head attention, vision transformers, FlashAttention/GQA/MLA, and typed graph attention (HGT, GraphBFF) are one idea in different wiring. Summary of my interactive attention course.

item.title: Graph Foundation Models, in Seven Ideas
item.description: Why there's no GPT for graphs yet, what the field is doing about it, and the billion-scale result that suggests the LLM playbook runs on graphs. Summary of my interactive GFM course.
